mapper.update: UPDATE MSP_DIS_TRG_DTL /*DisTrg_SQL.updateTrgDtlT*/ SET PROC_YN = 'T', PROC_ID = 'BATCH1', PROC_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE 1 = 1 AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt} AND PROC_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_TRG_MST /*DisTrg_SQL.inserTrgMst*/ ( TRG_MST_SEQ, TRG_DTL_SEQ, REGST_DT, PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT, EFFECTIVE_DATE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) SELECT 'TM' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_TM.NEXTVAL, '000000')) TRG_MST_SEQ, TRG_DTL_SEQ, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') REGST_DT, 'N' PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT, EFFECTIVE_DATE, 'BATCH1' REGST_ID, SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC, B.ETC1, EVNT_TRTM_NO DESC) AS RNK, B.ETC1, A.TRG_DTL_SEQ, A.REGST_DT, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.EVNT_CD, A.EVNT_TRTM_NO, A.EVNT_TRTM_DT, A.EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_DTL A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.EVNT_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0091' AND A.PROC_YN = 'T' AND A.REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt} ORDER BY A.EFFECTIVE_DATE ) AA WHERE RNK = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MSP_DIS_TRG_DTL /*DisTrg_SQL.updateTrgDtlY*/ SET PROC_YN = 'Y', PROC_ID = 'BATCH1', PROC_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt}
mapper.select: SELECT /*DisTrg_SQL.getBaseDate*/ CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE 1 = 1 AND GRP_ID = 'CMN0271' AND USG_YN = 'Y'
